title: erigeron alpiniformis
intro: Erigeron alpiniformis, also known as mountain fleabane, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. Erigeron alpiniformis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat a range of ailments.
